class.name: LottieAnimation
class.brief_description: Plays Lottie and dotLottie animations as a 2D engine node.
class.description:
[LottieAnimation] renders Lottie JSON and dotLottie archives directly in the engine without requiring an external addon at runtime.
The node supports playback control, fit-box rendering, dynamic resolution, optional viewport culling, basic frame caching, and dotLottie animation selection. It is designed to be usable from Godot projects, embedded Android hosts consuming the AAR, and Windows editor workflows using the custom engine build.

signal.name: animation_finished
signal.description: Emitted when playback reaches the final frame and [member looping] is [code]false[/code].

signal.name: animation_loaded
signal.description: Emitted after an animation load attempt finishes. [code]success[/code] is [code]true[/code] when the animation source was loaded and is ready to render.

signal.name: frame_changed
signal.description: Emitted whenever the rendered frame changes.

constant.name: ENGINE_OPTION_THORVG_SW
constant.description: Uses the built-in ThorVG software renderer.

constant.name: CULLING_VIEWPORT
constant.description: Skips drawing when the transformed animation bounds are outside the viewport plus [method get_culling_margin_px].

member.name: animation_path
member.description: Path to a [code].json[/code] or [code].lottie[/code] animation source.

member.name: autoplay
member.description: If [code]true[/code], playback starts automatically once the animation is loaded.

member.name: dotlottie/selected_animation
member.description: Selects a specific animation inside a dotLottie archive by id or path. If empty, the archive default or first animation is used.

member.name: dynamic_resolution
member.description: If [code]true[/code], the internal render target scales with the node transform to improve sharpness.

member.name: engine_option
member.description: Selects the rendering backend. The current engine build supports [constant ENGINE_OPTION_THORVG_SW].

member.name: fit_box_size
member.description: Target size used when [member fit_into_box] is enabled.

member.name: fit_into_box
member.description: If [code]true[/code], the animation is rendered to [member fit_box_size]. If [code]false[/code], the animation uses its native size.

member.name: frame_cache/budget_mb
member.description: Maximum memory budget, in megabytes, used for cached frames.

member.name: frame_cache/enabled
member.description: Enables frame caching for integer frames to reduce repeated rendering work.

member.name: frame_cache/step_frames
member.description: Caches every Nth integer frame when frame caching is enabled.

member.name: looping
member.description: If [code]true[/code], playback loops back to the beginning after the last frame.

member.name: max_render_size
member.description: Upper clamp for the internal render target size.

member.name: offset
member.description: Draw offset applied to the animation inside the node.

member.name: resolution_threshold
member.description: Minimum relative size change needed before the render target is resized.

method.name: get_culling_margin_px
method.description: Returns the culling margin in pixels.

method.name: get_duration
method.description: Returns the total animation duration in seconds.

method.name: get_render_size
method.description: Returns the current internal render target size.

method.name: get_total_frames
method.description: Returns the total frame count of the loaded animation.

method.name: is_using_animation_size
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the animation is using its native size instead of [member fit_box_size].

method.name: pause
method.description: Pauses playback and keeps the current frame.

method.name: render_static
method.description: Renders the current frame once without advancing playback.

method.name: seek
method.description: Seeks to the specified frame and renders it immediately.

method.name: set_culling_margin_px
method.description: Sets extra pixel margin used by viewport culling.

method.name: set_culling_mode
method.description: Sets the culling mode. Use [constant CULLING_DISABLED] or [constant CULLING_VIEWPORT].

method.name: set_frame
method.description: Sets the current frame and renders it immediately.

method.name: set_render_size
method.description: Sets the target render size and enables [member fit_into_box].

method.name: set_use_animation_size
method.description: Enables or disables using the animation native size directly.

method.name: stop
method.description: Stops playback and resets to the first frame.
